314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7fd6/4bd7760e/5fcf7880/77a9a080/1274952485/VEsEBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=20+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200709_2MO-1MNTL-3MC_1MC_2_goroffsplit&source=314_EM_FR_200709_2MO-1MNTL-3MC_1MC_2_goroffsplit")** to make a donation.

To get text message updates from 314 Action text 314 to 31498.

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: NEW focus group invite #4012679 for Peter Willis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There are only 39 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17. |
---
Peter,

There are only 39 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President.

This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump!

**So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help.**

[ Will you be a part of our Pre-Convention Focus Group and answer a few quick survey questions for us?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0aba/2249377830/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS") | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0aba/2249377830/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0aba/2249377830/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and _less than three months_ left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing.

But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states.

So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean _everyone_!

The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that.

[So even if you've answered questions like this before, we count on surveys like this to gather new data and percentages as our team grows and new events (like the convention!) take place.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0aba/2249377830/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

**Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward.**
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0aba/2249377830/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.07_B1_conventionfocus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")
---
Thanks,

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab9/2249377830/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab8/2249377830/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab7/2249377830/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab6/2249377830/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab5/2249377830/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab4/2249377830/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab3/2249377830/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab2/2249377830/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab1/2249377830/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab0/2249377830/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab3/2249377830/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0aaf/2249377830/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0ab2/2249377830/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf29/1cd0ac28/892aa948/357c0aae/2249377830/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
clean_body: There are only 39 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17. | Peter, There are only 39 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President. This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump! So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help. "" | "" "" We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and less than three months left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing. But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states. So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean everyone! The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that. "" Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward. "" Thanks, JoeBiden.com | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: Dangerous: Houston Mayor "Cancels" the Texas State GOP Convention -
body:
Hello, Patriots! On Wednesday, July 8, Houston Mayor Sylvester Turner canceled the state Republican convention in "his" city. This is another leftist
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=240520.1715.1.ff97a994f8619bf1d9c5252d5f2d0f4a) |
---
Hello, Patriots!
---
On Wednesday, July 8, Houston Mayor Sylvester Turner canceled the state Republican convention in "his" city. This is another leftist/liberal attack on citizens' Constitutional First Amendment rights to free speech and peaceful gathering. Turner claims the cancellation is out of fear of the spread of COVID-19, and in the name of public safety. Hypocritically, Turner and Houston hosted a large funeral service for George Floyd, which drew thousands of people, all in close contact with each other. In recent years, citizens' rights have been continually assaulted and limited by Democrats and the radical left, and this is one more example. How long will Republicans and conservatives continue to watch their Constitutional rights shrink without pushing back? A state party political meeting or convention is a First Amendment right, and cannot be stopped or interfered with by the local, state or federal government. If Republicans and conservatives don't resist this overreach of power, it will set a dangerous precedent for the future. Today the Democrats and Leftists canceled the Texas state GOP convention, tomorrow they will cancel the national GOP convention and/or any political or religious gathering they oppose. Wake up, Texas and America. Get a backbone. CALL YOUR STATE SENATOR

On Wednesday, July 8, Houston Mayor Sylvester Turner canceled the state Republican convention in "his" city. This is another leftist/liberal attack on citizens' Constitutional First Amendment rights to free speech and peaceful gathering. Turner claims the cancellation is out of fear of the spread of COVID-19, and in the name of public safety. Hypocritically, Turner and Houston hosted a large funeral service for George Floyd, which drew thousands of people, all in close contact with each other. In recent years, citizens' rights have been continually assaulted and limited by Democrats and the radical left, and this is one more example. How long will Republicans and conservatives continue to watch their Constitutional rights shrink without pushing back? A state party political meeting or convention is a First Amendment right, and cannot be stopped or interfered with by the local, state or federal government. If Republicans and conservatives don't resist this overreach of power, it will set a dangerous precedent for the future. Today the Democrats and Leftists canceled the Texas state GOP convention, tomorrow they will cancel the national GOP convention and/or any political or religious gathering they oppose. body:
PATRIOTS! DONATE NOW TO HELP US FIGHT COMMUNISM AND TYRANNY July 10, 2020 As you have heard, the facilities contract with the City of Houston for t
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=244724.1722.1.e2c9af2d9808307cc1cf5cc148b8eeca) |
---
# PATRIOTS!
---
| | [ DONATE NOW TO HELP US FIGHT COMMUNISM AND TYRANNY ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=244724.1723.1.96ca435a55f82f434f1d9d9cb96ff22d)
---
July 10, 2020 As you have heard, the facilities contract with the City of Houston for the 2020 Republican Party of Texas (RPT) State Convention was terminated by Houston Mayor Sylvester Turner. There’s alleged legal talks happening to allegedly push back on that. We won’t get into any of the behind-the-scenes maneuvering by Republican operatives who never wanted an in-person convention in the first place. Suffice it to say that the grassroots have had enough! Coming up from Republican Precinct, County, and Senate District Conventions were platform resolutions pushing back on Gov. Abbott’s shutdown policies, his $295 million contact tracing contract awarded in two days, and his distribution of millions of federal dollars – all without the input of the Texas Legislature. These platform resolutions from the grassroots sent alarms up to the top! Why is this important to you even if you aren’t involved in the GOP? To put a fine point on it – Texas is no monarchy nor should it be run by a King and a handful of oligarchs. The Texas Constitution is clear. It gives no authority to a Governor to waive law or make law – only the legislature is tasked with that because they represent “the Consent of the Governed,” or The People. Hopefully, all of you are aware that “Consent of the Governed was the FOUNDATIONAL issue addressed in the Declaration of Independence! Dangerous precedent-setting! When – not if – a Democrat or even an uber-progressive Republicrat is elected governor, what do you think they will do with this “on the books” power grab by the executive branch over the legislative branch? Think about the next time there is a school or mass shooting. Do you think your gun rights will be safe? What if a future governor declares a statewide emergency and decides he will waive state laws that protect your right to defend yourself, your family and your “castle?” Under the cover of unconstitutional “Emergency Powers” laws on the books, COVID-19 has been used to silence the voice of The People, expand government authority, commit taxpayers to untold debt, destroy businesses/jobs, empower socialist redistribution of wealth, put a government boot on churches, ration health care for non-COVID patients, and torch civil liberties. Unheard, “We the People” have had enough! Coming on the heels of multiple lawsuits representing hundreds of plaintiffs filed against Gov. Abbott, now a grassroots revolt is underway as several Republican County Executive Committees (CECs) have passed Censure Resolutions against Gov. Abbott. As of this writing, Ector, Harrison, Montgomery, and Llano County Republican Executive Committees have passed resolutions to invoke Republican Party of Texas Censure Rule 44 against Abbott’s actions. Other CECs are meeting this week. From the Ector County Censure: “[T]he Ector County Republican Party finds that Governor Greg Abbott violated the third provision of the core principles by failing to preserve the freedoms of Texans when he enacted executive orders that resulted in the denial of due process to millions of Texans, constituted takings without just compensation by closing businesses without just cause, denied the people the right to freedom of assembly, and imposed onerous mandates, fines, and imprisonment upon the people.” “On this day 244 years ago, our founding fathers fought for their independence from a foe that issued mandates and collected excessive taxes. The Ector County Republican Executive Board decided it would be a fitting day for us to send a clear message to Governor Abbott. A message that we will no longer sit quietly while he overreaches his authority again, again, and again. He does this while ignoring the platform of the Republican Party. The very party whose grassroots voted him into office. So, on this 4th of July, Independence Day we, the Ector County Republican Executive Board, formally voted to censure Gov. Abbott.” What’s the Solution? All Governor Abbott has to do is listen to State Senators Bob Hall (R-Edgewood, SD2) and Charles Perry (R-Lubbock, SD 28), along with State Representatives Mike Lang, Matt Schaefer, Kyle Biedermann, Tony Tinderholt, and Jonathan Stickland who all publicly sounded the alarm for a special session last week. Today, the Texas House Freedom Caucus released a firm letter to Abbott, laying out the case for a special session in great detail. Members of the TX House Freedom Caucus are: Representatives Mayes Middleton, Matt Schaefer, Matt Krause, Kyle Biedermann, Briscoe Cain, Mike Lang, Matt Shaheen, Valoree Swanson, Tony Tinderholt, Steve Toth, and Bill Zedler This is not hard or difficult to understand. Gov. Abbott should immediately call a special session of the legislature to allow for public hearings and debate about the appropriate, constitutional response to COVID-19. What can you do to give the Governor a push in the right direction? Forget calling the Governor’s Office. He did not heed the thousands of calls during the 2019 legislative session, nor those in support of our unity project – The Lone Star Agenda, nor calls about the shutdown, contact tracing contract, etc. He and Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick have ignored the last several Texas Conservative Grassroots Coalition letters as we attempted to lodge our grievances. Call you state senator AND your state representative! Tell him/her you want them to publicly call on Abbott for a special session. Do NOT listen to any of their weasel excuses. There are none. One I’ve heard is, “The state capitol is closed. We don’t have anywhere to meet.” It is closed to the public – not to legislators. If a legislator is afraid to go in the building, tell him/her that Abbott can waive anything – so ask King Abbott to help. Besides that, the Gov. had plexiglass shields installed around the desks. Tell your legislator to wear a spiffy elephant mask or a purple mask that some of them love to sport around. Just get to work! Related | Part 2: State GOP delegates fear disenfranchisement and/or an unverified vote! After receiving numerous calls from Republican Party of Texas Convention delegates who fear the RPT’s virtual convention plans will disenfranchise them, we have today sought legal counsel and will move forward to help delegates take legal action against the RPT should these delegates be disenfranchised/excluded from voting. At issue: The State Republican Executive Committee has seen no contract, but the Officials’ Committee convened online in an executive session at noon today to vote on a contract they had NOT seen with a vendor they did not vet. A virtual convention with votes being cast online for federal (Presidential) electors, state/national party officials, party rules and the platform has NO method by which votes cast can be verified! What is disenfranchisement? Many delegates come from parts of Texas with no highs peed internet or low-quality internet service. Many have no electronic devices capable of reliable participation and many possess less than stellar technical skills. At this point, no training has been set up to even acquaint our SRECs and Committee Chairman with training on this system even though the convention is next week! Any of these issues – if they prevent a credentialed delegate from fully participating in the convention voting process would constitute disenfranchisement. The Solution? We support remote in-person streamlined “business only-no fluff conventions” held with order and decorum in either Congressional or Senate District configurations. Votes should be cast on paper ballots, utilizing methods that ensure reliable, verifiable votes cast by only credentialed delegates and their alternates – should a delegate become unable to participate. Grassroots America stands ready to help delegates’ voices be heard via verifiable votes and a transparent, ethical, high standards process. Should the leadership of the RPT take a path that excludes credentialed delegates from voting or in any way participating fully, legal action against the Republican Party of Texas is most assuredly on the table. Let me be VERY CLEAR here, the ball is in the court of the RPT Chairman’s Leadership Team. What we are asking for is reasonable: Every credentialed delegate (and alternate, if called upon) – no matter who they support in the Chairman’s race or in any other competitive intra-party race – should be assured that they will be able to fully participate in the Republican Party of Texas Convention process and that their voting will be secure and verifiable. As long as an alternative to the Houston Convention mandates that every credentialed delegate can fully participate and cast votes in a manner that is secure and verifiable, there will be no trouble from us. **_*CREDIT TO GRASSROOT AMERICA FOR THIS CALL TO ACTION_**
---
## WHAT WILL WE DO?
---
|
---
Protesting the Cancellation of the GOP Convention:
Thursday July 16 at 10 am at Houston City Hall
https://facebook.com/events/s/protest-and-march-for-our-righ/563428460992588/?ti=icl
Friday July 17 5:30pm-7:30pm at Houston
Convention Center
https://facebook.com/events/s/protest-the-cancellation-of-go/2587422224809177/?ti=icl
https://facebook.com/events/s/stand-for-our-right-to-free-as/662043354397050/?ti=icl
Saturday July 18, TBD
**THANK YOU**
**LATINOS FOR TRUMP
VISIT LATINOSFORTRUMP.US**

We are virtually tied with our opponent, and this confirms what we've been saying, Team Manny has the momentum! We can’t let up now. We have moved over 20 points in the polls this past month. Voters are responding to our conservative message of standing up to the left wing mobs and defending America. With nearly 13% of voters still undecided, I need your help. We know we have a winning message: Tennesseans want a conservative outsider, someone who is not a part of the same old political class, someone who will take on the mobs and the radical Left and defend this country. If we reach enough people, we will win. name: Catherine Englebrecht
subject: WATCH: Interview with 2 EAC Commissioners
body:
https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=82A127A14A710 Friend, I can't thank you enough for your valued partnership in protecting our election security. As we get closer and closer to Election Day, I want all of our supporters to have the most accurate information possible about the challenges we will be facing ahead of November with the significant increase in absentee voting. I invited two commissioners with the Election Assistance Commission (EAC), Christy McCormack and Don Palmer, to join me on our weekly Red, White, and True News podcast and share how the recent push for mail-in voting could impact our election. If you aren't already aware, the EAC is an independent agency that assists in election administration and makes recommendations on how to improve elections across the country. https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=82A127A14A712 Christy and Donald discuss the logistical nightmare associated with switching to mail-in ballots so quickly and suggest that to have a successful election with primarily mail-in votes would require a FIVE TO TEN YEAR TRANSITION PERIOD to ensure a fair and responsible election. They go into the long list of logistical requirements to obtain the proper paper for ballots, ensure that each voter gets the correct ballot, clean up registration rules, and then properly process the many ballots with educated volunteers. The transition would be expensive, require significant resources and would ultimately need much more TIME. Yet, election officials all over the country are assuring voters they can make such changes in only a few months. It's absurd. Without the proper precautions, we risk a major threat to election security - a threat that could require intervention by the the Supreme Court. I hope you will tune in to hear about this and more! Don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube page so you can be notified when new videos are posted. Thank you for all you do to keep our elections free, fair, and secure. Onward! Catherine Contribute id:2020-07-09-16:32:17:255t
Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved.
True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Requesting your immediate response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We recently asked you to take our Republican Majority Survey, but it looks like you may have missed our request. Can you spare a moment?

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55676536:skCU9W-NK:m:1:2247059263:2320196CE2A26EFF984ED7B181F0C941:r)
---
**SURVEY** :How do Republicans maintain an edge in the fight to take back the House during this uniquely challenging time?

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55676536:skCU9W-NK:m:1:2247059263:2320196CE2A26EFF984ED7B181F0C941:r)
---

Peter,

I hope you and your family are doing well during this unprecedented time.

Like you, I'm hopeful that we'll be able to move on from this troubling period in history as soon as possible. In Congress, we've passed three separate relief packages to help sustain the economy while we try to bring about as swift an end to this pandemic as possible.

That being said, **Democrats wasted no time in attempting to turn this crisis into an opportunity for them to check-off items from their ideological wish list by** :
* Allocating $25 million to the Kennedy Center in emergency relief. After this, the Center subsequently laid off a majority of their staff
* **Creating yet another special committee to attack the President for his efforts during this crisis**
* Using these uncertain times to push for vote-by-mail in nearly every state in the Union

[**Today, we're hoping to hear directly form you - members of the conservative grassroots base - regarding your thoughts on how Republicans should move forward with wrestling back control of the House given the country's current state of affairs.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55676536:skCU9W-NK:m:1:2247059263:2320196CE2A26EFF984ED7B181F0C941:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55676536:skCU9W-NK:m:1:2247059263:2320196CE2A26EFF984ED7B181F0C941:r)
My team and I read your responses to these surveys, and we want to make sure you have the opportunity to share your thoughts with us and the other leaders in the Republican Party.

**[Will you take a moment to share your thoughts with us as to how you think House Republicans should react to Democrat attempts to politicize this national crisis?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55676536:skCU9W-NK:m:1:2247059263:2320196CE2A26EFF984ED7B181F0C941:r)**

For liberty,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55676536:skCU9W-NK:m:1:2247059263:2320196CE2A26EFF984ED7B181F0C941:r)
Jim Jordan

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/55676536:skCU9W-NK:m:1:2247059263:2320196CE2A26EFF984ED7B181F0C941:r)

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

Delaware, OH 43015

body:

| |

# Patriots!
---
We are proud to announce our endorsement of Raul Reyes for Congress in the Texas Congressional Seat of District 23. Our PAC fully endorses Raul and we know that a vote for his opponent is a vote against our President. Do not be fooled by candidates that are telling you they are for our President. The outgoing Congressman Will Hurd's voting record is only at 27% conservative. Will Hurd has been voting with Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist communist elected officials. Now Will Hurd has chosen a protege Tony Gonzales. Patriots DO NOT let this man become the representative that will vote against America First. We need YOU! Please contact raulreyesforcongress.com donate, sign up to phone bank, blockwalk, or to become a social media influencer for Raul Reyes. Our President is counting on YOU to send him the right Congressman to office. We know that you are loyal to our President. this is why we are writing to YOU. This is an urgent matter. **Early Voting begins July 6 through the 10th and Election Day in Congressional District 23 is July 14th. We need ALL hands on deck!**

body:
Over the last few months, we’ve shifted to running a largely digital campaign focused on keeping our team and our neighbors safe while still doing everything we can to make the case as to why Eugene is the best person to represent PA-10 in Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18202361/220562710/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.10_b1_rvte_all-nd&refcode2=9ceb3f82-b8c2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2ViM2Y4Mi1iOGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r941kWkgHsRYzXrz1RL8djDDlu1tgFUR1OMvh9Z20UY=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Hey team!

I just wanted to check in and give you a quick update on our campaign. We are just four months away from the election, and typically at this point in time, we would be engaging hundreds of volunteers and knocking thousands of doors in an effort to share Eugene’s message with every voter we can.

**Over the last few months, we’ve shifted to running a largely digital campaign focused on keeping our team and our neighbors safe while still doing everything we can to make the case as to why Eugene is the best person to represent PA-10 in Congress.** We may not be knocking doors, but we are texting voters, phone banking, sending mailers, and running digital ads.

[**While Scott Perry is relying on special interests to buy him this race, we’re counting on supporters like you to help us keep up our grassroots outreach. name: Margaret Good
subject: Our District, Florida, and the outcome of this election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our District and our state are key to President Trump winning re-election, that’s why the Republican convention is scheduled to be an in-person event in our state — it’s a last-ditch effort to host a publicity stunt that puts the lives of Floridians in danger.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18202453/220565134/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWEwZjI0OC1iOWMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9370LCF0OACnabh42sdwpHoryD2C8cdc06Y6Drji3w=&emci=634b9e04-b0c2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=91a0f248-b9c2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644) Friends,

You may remember, a few weeks ago Vice President Pence was planning yet another visit to this District — it wasn’t his first visit here, and it certainly won’t be his last.

And that’s no coincidence. Our District and our state are key to President Trump winning re-election, that’s why the Republican convention is scheduled to be an in-person event in our state — it’s a last-ditch effort to host a publicity stunt that puts the lives of Floridians in danger. This means keeping up our momentum is more important than ever.

**[That’s why we need you — if we can get 200 grassroots donors to step up before our mid-month deadline, I know we can stay on track for July. Please — make a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18202454/220565135/1073285021?refcode=em07102020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWEwZjI0OC1iOWMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9370LCF0OACnabh42sdwpHoryD2C8cdc06Y6Drji3w=)**

I’m proud of the campaign we’re running, and am grateful to have supporters like you with me in this work.

Thank you,

Margaret | [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18202455/220565136/1073285021?refcode=em07102020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWEwZjI0OC1iOWMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9370LCF0OACnabh42sdwpHoryD2C8cdc06Y6Drji3w=)
---
| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! name: Josh Hicks
subject: If you want to flip this seat from red to blue and help take down Mitch McConnell in the process, I need you today.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Last week, we came through our primary with flying colors. And now we know the big battle — winning on November 3 — is ahead of us.
---
| Hey, everybody, it’s Josh. **Last week, we came through our primary with flying colors. And now we know the big battle — winning on November 3 — is ahead of us.** If you want to flip this Congressional seat from red to blue and help take down Mitch McConnell in the process, I need you today. **_[Click here to chip in $28 (our average online donation last month).](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18205421/220618343/-46754211?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200710_em_fr_polanalysis2_all_l1_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWY1NjY3ZS1jYmMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BB_t1RiDdzkPQC2Exjx6qSJImQqgsQxYnpyohMB3giU=)_ Grassroots contributions go a long way to making sure we get new — and real — leadership in Washington. And your support will be why we win this November.** \- Josh PS: Check out the email below from my campaign manager, Brett. He sent an email to supporters earlier this week laying out the primary results, and how that impacts our race in November. Take a look if you haven’t read it yet. \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: Brett Anders
Subject: We’ve got to make every day count if we’re going to flip this district.
Date: Tuesday, July 7 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18205422/220618344/-46754211?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200710_em_fr_polanalysis2_all_hdr_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWY1NjY3ZS1jYmMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BB_t1RiDdzkPQC2Exjx6qSJImQqgsQxYnpyohMB3giU=) Hey, friends, I’m Brett, Josh’s campaign manager. Now that we’re full steam ahead toward Election Day, I want to share a few facts about what our team was able to accomplish in the primary (thanks to you!). **I’m here to tell you that the results of the primary are very encouraging for our race in November:**
* Josh won 72.4% of the vote, and won all 19 counties overwhelmingly.
* There were 43,262 more votes cast in the Democratic primary than in the Republican (that’s 63% more votes!).
* With safety precautions in place and record numbers of votes cast by mail, turnout was high _in every single county in the district_.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18205423/220618345/-46754211?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200710_em_fr_polanalysis2_all_img_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWY1NjY3ZS1jYmMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BB_t1RiDdzkPQC2Exjx6qSJImQqgsQxYnpyohMB3giU=)There are just 119 days until Election Day and we’ve got to make every day count if we’re going to flip this district.[ _**If you’re able, please consider making a donation to Josh’s campaign right now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18205424/220618346/-46754211?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200710_em_fr_polanalysis2_all_l2_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWY1NjY3ZS1jYmMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BB_t1RiDdzkPQC2Exjx6qSJImQqgsQxYnpyohMB3giU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18205429/220618432/-46754211?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=HIC_20200710_em_fr_polanalysis2_all_abx10_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWY1NjY3ZS1jYmMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BB_t1RiDdzkPQC2Exjx6qSJImQqgsQxYnpyohMB3giU=)

Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. clean_body: Last week, we came through our primary with flying colors. And now we know the big battle — winning on November 3 — is ahead of us. | Hey, everybody, it’s Josh. Last week, we came through our primary with flying colors. And now we know the big battle — winning on November 3 — is ahead of us. If you want to flip this Congressional seat from red to blue and help take down Mitch McConnell in the process, I need you today. = Grassroots contributions go a long way to making sure we get new — and real — leadership in Washington. And your support will be why we win this November. \- Josh PS: Check out the email below from my campaign manager, Brett. He sent an email to supporters earlier this week laying out the primary results, and how that impacts our race in November. Take a look if you haven’t read it yet. \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: Brett Anders Subject: We’ve got to make every day count if we’re going to flip this district. Date: Tuesday, July 7 = Hey, friends, I’m Brett, Josh’s campaign manager. Now that we’re full steam ahead toward Election Day, I want to share a few facts about what our team was able to accomplish in the primary (thanks to you!). I’m here to tell you that the results of the primary are very encouraging for our race in November: Josh won 72.4% of the vote, and won all 19 counties overwhelmingly. There were 43,262 more votes cast in the Democratic primary than in the Republican (that’s 63% more votes!). With safety precautions in place and record numbers of votes cast by mail, turnout was high in every single county in the district. are just 119 days until Election Day and we’ve got to make every day count if we’re going to flip this district.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = We had a record-setting fundraising quarter from April to June (more on that soon). Small-dollar donations from emails like this one helped propel our campaign in Q2, and we’re going to need your help again in Q3. Thanks so much for everything you’ve done to support this campaign so far. We couldn’t have made it this far without you! \- Brett Anders Campaign Manager = | | | | = Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. name: Hillary Holley
subject: INVITE: Volunteer with Fair Fight Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7bb/117292175/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - We are just 115 days away from November 3 and a month out from the disaster of the June 9 primary. The August 11 runoff election is the final crucial test before the General Election. Thanks to your help, Fair Fight Action was able to contact hundreds of thousands of voters ahead of the June 9 election and we documented thousands of stories after. It's time to get to work so that we can use the August runoff to test our systems and be prepared to mitigate voter suppression for November. **Here are the ways you can get involved to ensure that voters have the resources and support to cast a ballot and have their vote counted in the August Runoff Election:**
1. **[Join our virtual Vote-By-Mail Weekend of Action on July 25 and 26](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7b8/117292175/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287040/"): **Join us for a weekend of action to text thousands of voters across Georgia about requesting absentee ballots, returning their ballots, and voting by mail! With your help we can provide voters with the necessary resources to cast their ballot. [**Sign up here.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7b8/117292175/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287040/")
2. [**Sign up to be a Declaration Volunteer in August:**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7b9/117292175/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287044/")Declaration volunteers help us document the stories from voters who share their experiences with us. Sign up now, and you can help our Voter Protection team collect stories from voters across the state and help make sure their voices are heard. This requires completing a virtual training. [**Sign up here.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7b9/117292175/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287044/")
3. **S[ign up to be an Early Vote Runner:](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7c6/117292175/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287152/")** Runners are our only current in-person volunteers. On the last day of early voting (August 7), EV Runners will help by going to polling places with lines or issues and, from a safe distance, sharing resources for voters to contact Fair Fight Action to share their experience. [**Sign up here.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7c6/117292175/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287152/")
4. [**Sign up to be an Election day Runner:**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7c6/117292175/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287152/")Runners are our only current in-person volunteers. On Election Day (August 11), ED Runners will help by going to polling places with lines or issues and, from a safe distance, sharing resources for voters to contact Fair Fight Action to share their experience. [**Sign up here.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7c6/117292175/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/287152/")

With your help, we can ensure that as many voters as possible have the information they need to vote, and that they can have their ballots counted. Thank you all for your support and being in this fight. Thank you, Hillary |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7c7/117292175/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7c4/117292175/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa445/34a064cc/1b970613/702e7c5/117292175/VEsHBw/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Like the bust of Nathan Bedford Forrest, Mike Sparks Must Go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Copy%20of%20Copy%20of%20header%20%282%29.png]
Dear Peter,
In a 9-2 vote yesterday, the Capitol Commission did the right thing and voted in favor of removing the Nathan Bedford Forrest bust [https://twitter.com/TheTNHoller/status/1281273717742538761] from the halls of the Tennessee Capitol Building. The two no votes? Republicans.
For almost a decade now, protestors, Black community leaders, legislators, activists, and the general public have pushed for the removal of the bust which memorializes a racist, traitor, and murderer. To you and me the decision to remove it from a place of honor in the state capitol is a no-brainer, but Republicans are still fighting hard for it to stay. Several Democrats introduced legislation during session to remove but time after time, Republicans killed the bills. Yesterday, Republican Mike Sparks (R-Smyrna) attended the meeting to deliver an in-person hurtful tirade to defend the man who murdered and terrorized Black Americans.
Mike Sparks offensive and inaccurate account of history does not represent this great state and his inability to lead or represent the people of his district is hurting all of us. To be clear, Sparks and his Republican colleagues declare, loudly, their support of Nathan Bedford Forrest, but vote against expanding health care access to more than 300k, paying teachers what they deserve, or saving lives during a pandemic.
Mike Sparks has got to go.
Donate, volunteer and vote for Brandon Thomas, the Democrat running against Sparks this election cycle. [https://votebrandonthomas.com/] It's up to us to make sure Nathan Bedford Forrest isn't the only bigot to leave the state capitol in 2020.
We've got a phenomenal list of Democratic candidates on the ballot this August and November. Check out the list and support who you can, how you can. [https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/]
Thank you!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/klee.jpg]
MEET KENDRA LEE, TNDP VOTER PROTECTION DIRECTOR
Thanks to so many of you who stepped up and contributed, the TNDP Voter Protection program is fully funded. Kendra Lee, the 2018 regional voter protection director for West Tennessee, started this as the statewide director of the 2020 program. Kendra's resume is long and varied and bringing her on will add additional consistency as we work with the program records, detailed training materials, sample letters and legal documents, workflows for running the hotline, and other activities created and compiled during the 2018 election. Key areas of focus will include absentee ballots education and monitoring, voter role integrity, poll watchers, voter protection hotline, and a legal boiler room. Welcome, Kendra!
EARLY VOTING FOR THE AUGUST 6TH PRIMARY STARTS JULY 17TH

https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/599804617406505/ [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/599804617406505/] This week, Chair Mary Mancini joined teacher, leader, and mom, Mariah Philliips for an iced coffee. Mariah is running for Tennessee State House District 37. Mariah talks about why she decided to run, the priorities of her campaign, and taking questions from viewers. Join the discussion! [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/videos/599804617406505/?v=599804617406505]

TWEETS OF THE WEEK
If you read one Twitter thread this week, make it this one from @thenameso [https://twitter.com/thenamesO/status/1281244981257175045]
https://twitter.com/thenamesO/status/1281244981257175045 [https://twitter.com/thenamesO/status/1281244981257175045]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-07-10%20at%209.28.23%20AM.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-07-10%20at%209.36.07%20AM.png]

WE NEED YOUR HELP
WE NEED YOUR HELP. Here's the reality: Because of the COVID-19 emergency, the Tennessee Democratic Party's resources are stretched thin. Given how this crisis will impact our economy, we are expecting a significant loss of revenue in the coming months which will impact our ability to win elections up and down the ballot this fall. Our staff, our offices, our voter protection program, our get out the vote program, our outreach programs, and our organizing capabilities all depend on the resources we can raise right now.
We need you in this fight alongside us. THANK YOU!

name: Bill Olson
subject: The Dems are consumed with hate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j9LZq9dsK_6OuRU&b=22hchXjj4CEm7HDF85ENTw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j9LZq9dsK_6OuRU&b=22hchXjj4CEm7HDF85ENTw

I am a Christian. As a Christian, we are taught to love, even your enemies.

That is why I don't understand the blind hatred the Democrats seem to have these days- against our country, against our history, against our very citizens!

Consider the actions of the Dems just in the last few weeks:

-Tearing down historical statues, even when it's illegal to do so. In Portland, mobs tore down statues of George Washington and Thomas Jefferson; in Richmond, Governor "Radical Ralph" Northam has torn down many statues along the city's famous Monument Ave. The DNC even came out swinging against historic Mt. Rushmore! It clearly doesn't matter if they are confederate statues or not; it's America they hate!

-Abolishing the police, depriving citizens of needed protection against violent crime. Look at what Joe Biden has now embraced:

It's clear Joe Biden's far left advisers are starting to change his stance on policing in America.

During an interview Wednesday with leftist publication This Now, Biden said the police are over militarized, have "become the enemy" and said funding should "absolutely" be reallocated elsewhere. In other words, he's advocating for the defunding of law enforcement as crime across the country continues to skyrocket.

-Depriving us of our Constitutionally-guaranteed rights, including our freedom of speech and freedom to worship.

The U.S. Constitution is also being tested in unprecedented ways, with religious leaders from Mississippi to Kentucky to San Diego County suing their governments, asserting that they are being treated differently from businesses that can remain open, such as supermarkets and liquor stores.

What is most disturbing is that the Supreme Court has backed California's restrictions on Freedom of Worship.

-Condoning violence by mobs.

House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"—in the wake of George Floyd's death.

The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."

Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Sen. Cornyn won't stand up for immigrants.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texans need a senator who says what she means and means what she says.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890127/7f51f7bc/413ec4b6/4ef60f3a/1707021375/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

The recent executive order to suspend work visas is unacceptable. Not only is it an affront to highly skilled immigrants seeking to live and work in Texas and all over the country, it will damage our economy that millions of immigrants contribute to every single day.

And, unfortunately, it's clear Sen. Cornyn isn't going to do anything about it. After nearly 20 years in Washington, he's talked and talked about the need to reform the immigration system -- but he's repeatedly opposed, blocked, and sabotaged bipartisan reform. **[It's one of many reasons I'm running to defeat him -- will you pitch in to help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890127/7f51f7bc/413ec4b6/4ef60f39/1707021375/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200710.1nd__1683__&amount=10")**

When a bipartisan bill to fix our immigration system and secure the border came to a vote in 2013, more than two-thirds of the Senate voted to pass it -- and it won support from senators in both parties and across the ideological spectrum. But Sen. Cornyn joined his boss, Mitch McConnell, in voting no.

Texans need a senator who says what she means and means what she says -- not someone who spends 20 years talking about a problem and then refuses to solve it when he gets the chance. I promise that as Texas' next senator, I won't just talk about the need to reform our immigration system -- I'll work to get it done.

**But we 're up against massive spending from big-money donors and outside groups like the Koch network who are working to prop up Sen. Cornyn. I'm counting on your help to take him on and _win_ this November. If you can, please pitch in today.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Term Limits NOW!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/term-limits-now?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# The Fourth of July weekend made me think back to the principles this country was founded on and many of the ways our Founding Fathers looked at government. They wanted a government by the people and for the people. They wanted limited government and a federal government that wasn’t overreaching. They wanted citizen legislators.

The Founding Fathers did not envision Washington and federal elective office as a lifetime career. They looked at Congress as a place where farmers, small business people, lawyers, teachers, etc. came together and made laws and governed and then went back home. Many early members of Congress and senators would go back home most of the year and engage in careers unrelated to government. Many only served a few years and then went home. This makes sense.

I have signed a term limits pledge because I do not view the U.S. Senate as a lifetime career. I view myself as a citizen legislator, a businessman who wants to give back to the state and nation I love. I want to go to Washington, work to grow our economy and make Kansas a better place and then come home.

Politicians should not get rich serving in the Senate. That is why I am pledging to donate my Senate salary to a Kansas charity.

The Senate is place where people should come together and govern and go home, not the House of Lords, a cushy lifetime sinecure.

Join me in my campaign to bring We the People to Washington.

Dave

P.S. – Please click on the logo below to help me get my message across to the people of Kansas.

[](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=160acf0843&e=41f8e27552)

clean_body: Donald Trump is at it again. | Peter -- Even after holding a rally in Tulsa, Oklahoma last month that had embarrassingly low turnout and put the health of those who did attend in danger, Donald Trump is at it again. Tomorrow night, Trump is holding another campaign rally in Portsmouth, New Hampshire. Peter, we have to send a strong message that we won't tolerate Trump's complete lack of regard for public health. We need to make it clear that we're fired up to elect a president who doesn't put politics over people, and who leads by example. "" Frankly, the truth is that when tens of thousands of grassroots supporters like you step up and chip in a few dollars at a time, it sends an undeniable message to Donald Trump that we're building a growing national coalition of Americans ready to vote him out of office. And Peter, that's why it's a critical time to make your first donation to Biden for President. "" | Biden for President Supporter Record Name: Peter Willis Donated to elect Joe Biden? No, not yet. We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Rokita has spent his political career stripping Americans of their health care and jacking up premiums. His 2020 candidacy puts over 560,000 Hoosiers' health care at risk. This is a race we can't afford to lose. **[Invest $15 in the campaign to take down Todd.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18208036/220651507/584876603?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=Rokita.Official.7.10.20_15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGFiZDZmZS1kN2MyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DyO5TrNCbdjllNEaOoc-DQbmdnJhul0QUPeIO60eebY=)** The good news? Rokita is an infamous loser. He lost the race to replace Mike Pence in 2016 and got outgunned in the 2018 Senate primary. The GOP even drew him out of his own legislative district to keep him from running. His unprecedented losing streak explains why the AG's race moved from "leans Republican" to "toss-up." clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | = It's official: Todd Rokita is the GOP's AG candidate. = = = The bad news? Rokita has spent his political career stripping Americans of their health care and jacking up premiums. His 2020 candidacy puts over 560,000 Hoosiers' health care at risk. This is a race we can't afford to lose. = The good news? Rokita is an infamous loser. He lost the race to replace Mike Pence in 2016 and got outgunned in the 2018 Senate primary. The GOP even drew him out of his own legislative district to keep him from running. His unprecedented losing streak explains why the AG's race moved from "leans Republican" to "toss-up." This is a race we can win as long as we have the resources to do it. = Every dollar you invest in the campaign to keep Rokita out gets us closer to restoring integrity to the AG's office, holding onto our health care, and protecting our rights. This is an investment worth making. name: Steph Houghton, Team Michelle
subject: kicking things into high gear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
We're really starting to kick things into high gear here at Team Michelle!
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Hey team,

We're really starting to kick things into high gear here at Team Michelle!

With less than one month until our primary election, we're working hard to make sure voters know why Michelle De La Isla is the different kind of leader we need fighting for us in Congress.

But we've never run an entirely digital Get Out the Vote program, and that means we've had to adjust our plans. If we're going to reach the voters we need ahead of our August 4 primary, then we need the help of grassroots supporters like you.

clean_body: We're really starting to kick things into high gear here at Team Michelle! Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team. Hey team, We're really starting to kick things into high gear here at Team Michelle! With less than one month until our primary election, we're working hard to make sure voters know why Michelle De La Isla is the different kind of leader we need fighting for us in Congress. But we've never run an entirely digital Get Out the Vote program, and that means we've had to adjust our plans. subject: Our team is strong 💪

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9f68840c0776/our-team-is-strong?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
Working to flip a seat from red to blue is never easy. Trying to do it during the middle of a pandemic? Well, that doesn't make it any easier. **But thanks to your support, this team has adapted and we've been able to stay on target with our goals. **

Since we won our primary back in March, our team of **over 400 volunteers** has been able to make**over 60,000 phone calls to voters in our district.**

We've sent**** over 10,000 postcards, and **we've grown our volunteer base to include large volunteer teams from each of the 6 colleges and universities in the district.**

[Chip in here to help us keep this momentum going. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5ca0d07e54&e=140a9b81e7)

We've built a strong team using 100% remote and digital organizing, and we need to make sure we have the tools we need to win this election over these last 116 days. **That's where you come in.** In order to pump up our voter outreach, **we need to expand our phonebanking and texting campaigns, invest more in digital advertising and make sure we get on TV in all 5 media markets in the district. **

The more money we raise, the more voters we can reach with our message that we know will resonate with them.

We know what it is going to take to win this race. [**Can we count on you to chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can give to help us make it happen?**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=78c5f50615&e=140a9b81e7)

Team Dani

clean_body: | | | | | | | Working to flip a seat from red to blue is never easy. Trying to do it during the middle of a pandemic? Well, that doesn't make it any easier. But thanks to your support, this team has adapted and we've been able to stay on target with our goals. Since we won our primary back in March, our team of over 400 volunteers has been able to makeover 60,000 phone calls to voters in our district. We've sent** over 10,000 postcards, and we've grown our volunteer base to include large volunteer teams from each of the 6 colleges and universities in the district. We've built a strong team using 100% remote and digital organizing, and we need to make sure we have the tools we need to win this election over these last 116 days. That's where you come in. In order to pump up our voter outreach, we need to expand our phonebanking and texting campaigns, invest more in digital advertising and make sure we get on TV in all 5 media markets in the district. The more money we raise, the more voters we can reach with our message that we know will resonate with them. We know what it is going to take to win this race. | | | Rita is dedicated to working hard for the people of IA-02 and that starts with fighting corruption in Washington. **[But we need to win one of the most competitive races in the country first. We must ensure we have the resources needed to win.](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFqobluQiYQaBSjQnDTZHi8c0yC7xYz6QaoY_ydO7cE=/dYNxNAkM2_2kuNzOYqePoboIRJRJWMujKF6haXOs9nw=?refcode=200710-email)** Too many politicians put politics before the people and listen to lobbyists more than their constituents. But that can change, and that starts with electing people with grit and moral character to Washington -- people like Rita. Thanks for all your support, Zachary Meunier
Campaign Manager
Rita Hart for Congress **\--- Forwarded Message ---** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFqobluQiYQaBSjQnDTZHi8c0yC7xYz6QaoY_ydO7cE=/Sc4NI65GIMbK6m8A9XoQ76KrrpC57mAqo81N677Mw94=?refcode=200710-email) I'm running for Congress because I, like many of you, am tired that the loudest, most powerful voices in the room are too often the only voices that get what they want in Washington. Being raised by a mother who had to speak only with a whisper taught me that often the most important voices are the ones we have to lean in to hear. On day one, I want to go to work to change how Washington operates. We need to get dark money out of politics, ban members of Congress from owning individual stocks, and make sure our leaders listen to people. **[In order to have a voice in changing Washington, I need to win this election and that happens because of small-dollar donations from folks like you. name: Ben Resnik, Defeat Disinfo
subject: “This is why I fight.” — You​​
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTRkyusDXXZGMdvxOLHoYGSAPyJwa7My4KT_NAuQDNwivDv3CP0_-qPCzS5fg3Y87D8I5tYNmMU9pQ0Z8Dtrds93R1WdFsuJJ-TXd6dKo9In6w58DU-NCZ5MREoCy0sV1cOnltdoFnS43PwmLVqAFyZhHCmYCuc-hxo-NNx8vKBazRN-lmT9Cs-g0ZQV_sLAoC/33c/99LOcVbqSO6L_XxutfoWEQ/h0/qxilx3_CfDiuKdIUPsmoMLfAL97e4C30evR4gBDy2RI) Hi there —

Since we began this journey, thousands of you have contributed to the fight against far-right disinformation. Your individual impacts cannot be understated — **and they shouldn’t go unnoticed**.

We emailed our donors a simple question: _Why have you deemed_**Defeat Disinfo** _worthy of your support?_

_“Trump is destroying America with his lies, stoking racial tension and dividing us for his crass political goal of "winning." If Trump wins, America loses.”

**— Skahil K.**

“I am fearful for my country in a way I could have never imagined in my lifetime. The current resident of the White House promotes division among our citizens and is motivated by nothing but ego, self-interest and his own financial well-being. His henchmen, as well as the judges he has appointed, have done potential damage that may take many years to move on from. He must be defeated.”

**— Gail W.** _
Whatever reason you had for opening this email and reading this far, Friend, we can’t thank you enough. We’re honored to be a part of your political story.

But we can’t sustain our mission without the help of donors like **Gail** and **Skahil** , who took their support a step further. When you push the [**red button below**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZke9l8ha7rJSpsoH8uSrN6BlW0aOHtOD809PGiKZfSYmp5x28o7EoW0HpxeVNqIA1TKvQBe4q-1KjDMPXcX3cRF_qiPsSQTAIdS6V7IuP-AdbP63e9fNZM3Mp_Cm5vyi47mtj0PYlsBEBXfDvEE3FG6bfd1WGXfgnRV2o_9ZSyZg0zRYyeWbXcO-WaRFhtGnCtXEBKO6HHnVILdZrkWJZ-Tj-GCJLl728GGVF9k_Lo5oLxCjmUIY2m9TawrDt_Q0sSI5bl2gdPPDiQp_LBeBFeKGgp2yp3svQewWVnhCbwB1ol5ysEdqxHSc5bf9A1713CuP27ixjVFONOlwnFhhX7kY/33c/99LOcVbqSO6L_XxutfoWEQ/h1/ydJIpr68lNN3nVc3siOBe0Xr6I1u2ouTApMuFq2dtKU), you take the same step they did, **and you do so for reasons all your own**.

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm__shRjkDNg9V_s_lKOfKMIcF0wvVJHcZtniyZ_uCy3CgjNfo0EzFPRkieYJWRhAGU5mYv9gP2vH0/33c/99LOcVbqSO6L_XxutfoWEQ/h2/Lb5nC_RrP_vQefx-FWmjm_UDKsqRMHVKyLjCsz5YToU)
It doesn’t matter how we got to this point — to an elected leader who places personal gain above the American people. What matters is what we do with our one and only chance to cut his term short.

Today, your contribution goes directly to that end.

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkVfho2mTw-AbzbbC1oukQ4kyzgBKApAHm5L0MXvVVR0X6pm40Iyd0MAFgomh8TpDbiIjGL4z_q8QWL_dbbJXu5cehnF7P_p71VeUoa1MPHzxxRKOuPa96BkOnutgYs6hLeKRcz42ZX5MaJlx974MRJxuARTq8TMbEPktrm5hu3Srul8Skd8_xp0dk-AkTdZdlHhH7PY7GVPwxKN0fTk5Hc40-mXOyvg0TjTI4BOa2G6cJzuVvp725sFWfA1WUYwAAFIN4NffpiOMzUQt0CYYmJ0Z06yfiwP8C1OUyMGOQ9QWyXBHIMoi8ffzvtTfQeQDTAU3xWl8cD4qOVKR5PVTueE/33c/99LOcVbqSO6L_XxutfoWEQ/h3/_sB3FHtjG6brXHBMN9DJ3hY_I5qH9Us9OvivkobPaRE)
Thank you for your support — and more soon,

Ben Resnik
Treasurer
Defeat Disinfo

name: Christy Smith
subject: She took care of people with HIV. But she couldn't afford her own insulin.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Late last month, in the dead of night, Donald Trump asked the Supreme Court to dismantle the Affordable Care Act -- and take health care away from millions of people.

While coronavirus case numbers spiked here in California and across the country, and after a report that 27 million Americans may have already lost their employer-sponsored health insurance in the wake of the pandemic, the Trump administration decided it would be the perfect time to strip health care coverage from another 23 million of us when we need it most.

**Let's be clear: Health care is a human right. There is _never_ a good time to take it away.**

But to do so in the middle of a historic pandemic is particularly cruel -- and it's just plain wrong.

**[While Trump was trying to take away health care coverage, Democrats in the House passed a bill to _expand_ the Affordable Care Act (Mike Garcia voted against it). Let's make sure it passes the Senate -- add your name if you support expanding health care coverage.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2c2/1869768769/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTBfQUNBcGV0X25vbm9wZW5zIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200710_ACApet_nonopens")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2c2/1869768769/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTBfQUNBcGV0X25vbm9wZW5zIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200710_ACApet_nonopens") I know firsthand how tough it can be when you're sick and can't access the treatment you need.

**My own mom, who spent decades working as a nurse and took care of patients with HIV during the early part of the AIDS crisis, couldn't afford her insulin. She hid her rationing from my brothers and me while she waited for Medicare to kick in. She passed away at 67.**

We're one of the richest nations in the world, but our people spend more on prescription drugs than any other.

It's time for our health care system to actually _work for people, not profits._ We need to enhance and expand the ACA, not destroy the law that gave millions of folks access to health insurance for the first time.

**[If you agree, take a minute to add your support to our petition and tell Congress you support expanding the ACA so we can make health care accessible to millions more.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2c2/1869768769/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTBfQUNBcGV0X25vbm9wZW5zIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200710_ACApet_nonopens")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2c2/1869768769/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTBfQUNBcGV0X25vbm9wZW5zIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_ACA?source=em20_200710_ACApet_nonopens") Thank you,

Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2c3/1869768769/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTBfQUNBcGV0X25vbm9wZW5zIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200710_ACApet_nonopens")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2c3/1869768769/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MTBfQUNBcGV0X25vbm9wZW5zIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200710_ACApet_nonopens")
---

---|---

PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2dd/1869768769/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bae8/29776869/9f3e46c/569ee2de/1869768769/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update July 3-July 10
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=83A128A14A740)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK

Friend,

These recent months have been uncertain, stressful, frustrating in many aspects. Yet you persevere. Through pandemic, through civil unrest, through an unprecedented assault on our election system, you persevere. THANK YOU. Because of your commitment, your work, your action, True the Vote stands strong. Yes we face a challenge unlike any other ahead of Election Day. But we are going to meet that challenge. I firmly believe that each of you will stand up, you will get your friends, family, and neighbors involved, and you will help fill the gap at our polling places and in our mail in ballot verification committees. We can’t do this without you. So please, if you haven’t already, I urge you to visit our [CALL YOUR COUNTY](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=83A128A14A741) web page, and help us build the information that our volunteer network needs to know where they can best serve. Your help is critical. I cannot thank you enough for your support, your service, and your patriotism. I look forward to continuing to partner with you all in our worthy effort to keep our elections free, fair, and secure.

Onward,
Catherine
