| | NEWS TO KNOW

1. Election Experts Warn of November Disaster. Millions of voters turned to mail-in ballots as a safe alternative to voting in person during the pandemic-riddled primary. But in states such as Georgia, Pennsylvania and Wisconsin, and in the District of Columbia, thousands of voters requested absentee ballots from local election officials and never received them. States were unprepared for the record numbers of absentee ballot requests, said Hannah Fried, national campaign director of All Voting is Local, a project of the Washington, D.C.-based nonprofit Leadership Conference Education Fund that helps register people of color and young people. [https://www.pewtrusts.org/en/research-and-analysis/blogs/stateline/2020/07/08/election-experts-warn-of-november-disaster
](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=83A128A14A744)
2\. Vermont Governor Allows Vote-By-Mail Bill to Become Law. Vermont Gov. Phil Scott said Thursday he's allowing a bill to allow mail in voting during the November presidential to become law without his signature. Under the new law all voters will receive ballots in the mail and they can return them by mail, take them to their local town or city clerk or bring the ballot to their polling place on Election Day. [https://www.usnews.com/news/best-states/vermont/articles/2020-07-02/4-burlington-bars-warned-for-not-following-covid-rules](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=83A128A14A745)

3\. High-stakes lawsuits could shape who votes and how ballots are counted in November. The latest salvo landed this week when the Trump campaign and Republican National Committee filed a federal lawsuit challenging Pennsylvania’s use of mail ballot drop boxes, its procedures for counting mail ballots, and restrictions on poll watchers. It marked a shift, with the GOP on offense in the state for the first time this election cycle instead of defending against Democratic and progressive groups’ legal challenges. [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/election/pennsylvania-2020-election-voting-lawsuits-20200704.html](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=83A128A14A746)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: You shouldn't be surprised: Nehls' absence on sex trafficking panel is deafening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Nehls CONTINUES to ignore victims | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/64249a43a4c5/nehls-threatens-legal-action-silences-victims-12607030?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: KathaleenWall.com** Friday, July 10, 2020
---
| | **Sheriff Troy Nehls No-Shows on Fort Bend County Sex Trafficking Panel and Continues to Ignore Victims **

_Sugar Land Conservative Kathaleen Wall Calls Out Sheriff Nehls’ For Not Facing Voters About Sex Trafficking in Fort Bend County_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall slams Fort Bend County Sheriff Troy Nehls for failing to show up to the Fort Bend County Panel Discussion last night hosted by Fort Bend County Judge KP George.

“In keeping with his eight-year failure to address the problem of sex-trafficking in Fort Bend County, Troy Nehls’ absence on the Panel Discussion on Sex Trafficking in Fort Bend County is deafening,” Wall said.

Panelists included Precinct 3 Constable Wayne Thompson, Fort Bend County District Attorney Brian Middleton, a special investigator from the Federal Bureau of Investigation, Executive Director Micah Gamboa of the well-known anti-trafficking non-profit Elijah Rising, and other local leaders in the anti-trafficking movement.

“Troy Nehls continues to avoid the public when the topic of sex-trafficking arises and instead sends his lapdog Lieutenant Bradley Whichard in his stead,” Wall said. “The irony is not lost on voters that not only is Nehls absent, but even his subordinate Lt. Whichard employs the same tactics in his public responses by dodging questions and ignoring victims of sex trafficking like Courtney Litvak.”

Courtney Litvak’s parents, Kelly and Alan Litvak, were among the thousands of viewers for the Panel Discussion. Both continually submitted questions that went unanswered throughout the event in attempts to hold Sheriff Nehls and his office accountable for their inaction in regards to their daughter Courtney.

“Whichard even refused to acknowledge that felony crimes occurred in Fort Bend County, and instead pointed the finger at Harris County,” Wall said. “Her trafficking began at Cinco Ranch High School which does indeed fall within Fort Bend County.”

Below please find a partial script for “Courtney’s Family’s Story,” and the YouTube link here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5F4yT-gpl78](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=4844836fca&e=01c99b7fbd)

[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=233c60dd43&e=01c99b7fbd)
**Courtney Litvak:** I was 17 and I was drawn into the life of sex trafficking as a minor.

**Kelly Litvak:** When we went to sit down with Sheriff Troy Nehls for a two-hour meeting... I felt so confident that he was going to immediately sound the alarms...

But instead, Sheriff Troy Nehls has ...publicly blamed and shamed our family.

**Alan Litvak** : Sheriff Troy Nehls, knows what's going on in his county... and has the gall to re-victimize a young lady, a mom, a dad, who have been through hell.

That's not serving the public, that's harming the public.

We don't need people like Troy Nehls in Fort Bend County, or Washington, DC.

And I’d love to look you in the eye and have you tell me how you can possibly sit there and not do your job and not protect my family – because that’s what you’ve done for years.

###
---

body:

We're joining forces with Congressman Tom O'Halleran because we represent two of the most competitive districts in the country. With all eyes on Arizona this November, we need to gear up for a long race. And we need to start NOW.

name: Team Sri, you (2)
subject: re: Focus group invitation for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Friend,

We wanted to remind you that you’ve been selected to join our important focus group of voters from all across the country to discuss what issues are at stake for them in this election.

Focus groups like this are an important way to connect with voters on the issues that matter, and they help build trust and accountability leading through the November election. As we build our campaign strategy for July and the rest of the campaign, it’s more important than ever to hear from our community. That’s why, if you can, we’re asking that you take a few minutes to complete our survey and let us know what issues matter most to you.

INVITED: Focus Group Survey ➜ https://secure.ngpvan.com/CH8WlrQWmk2eP_YGt4_UkQ2

Folks from all around the country are starting to take note of our campaign, friend . They’re starting to recognize that we have a real shot at flipping TX-22 (and maybe even the whole state!) blue in 2020, and that’s an exciting prospect for Democrats all across the nation.

If we win in November, we’ll be able to make progress on issues like health care and ensuring our economy works for everyone, and it means a more transparent, accountable government for all.

That means fighting the long fight, and it means standing together to make our voices heard. That’s why this focus group is so important, friend -- it helps us better understand and amplify the voices of our community and country and ensure that agenda is at the forefront of our campaign.

Fill out our survey and be heard!

INVITED: Focus Group Survey ➜ https://secure.ngpvan.com/CH8WlrQWmk2eP_YGt4_UkQ2

Thanks,
--Team Sri

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020response?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.10_tsy2_b1_all&amount=25

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020response?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.10_tsy2_b1_all&amount=25]
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fa58384a-e5c2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0/ca67abc3-edc2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTY3YWJjMy1lZGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLxsi0X92pgPOE_DkmJz2oBvYPvahSuyvZVPk5eVV-I=&id=117373579 .

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: A plea from Jenny Beth Martin to the President, the CDC’s ridiculous guidelines, “cancel culture” rebuffed, and more.
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20192-060cdf2f23a44e119a653c149ef42230/80/100/73b2b75a-b9f9-4798-a6c0-aaa5e85f67d2)** As we continue to re-open our country and re-start our great American economy, there is one thing that has become abundantly clear: We MUST re-open schools. First, Democrats wanted to keep us all locked down in our homes. When that failed, they wanted to keep us from gathering in public and going to church. When that failed, they wanted to force us to wear masks. And now, they are already planning their next failed move. They want to stop American children from returning to school in the fall. Already this fight has begun and luckily our very own Jenny Beth Martin is on the front-lines of this fight. Not only as the Co-Founder of Tea Party Patriots, but also as a patriotic mother fighting for her children. At a roundtable discussion hosted by the President, Jenny Beth made her feelings abundantly clear to the President, Vice President and First Lady saying: “Mr. President, you were right, and I hope you will trust your instincts: America is not meant to be shut down and we have to reopen schools this fall...” [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2VzdGVybmpvdXJuYWwuY29tL3BhdHJpb3RpYy1tb20tdGVsbHMtdHJ1bXAtdHJ1dGgtc2Nob29scy1wb3dlcmZ1bC12aWRlby8_bWlkPTQyMzQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=_fB9074Lt9jC7gx_8Nndjw) **[Patriotic Mom Tells Trump the Truth About Schools in Powerful Video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2VzdGVybmpvdXJuYWwuY29tL3BhdHJpb3RpYy1tb20tdGVsbHMtdHJ1bXAtdHJ1dGgtc2Nob29scy1wb3dlcmZ1bC12aWRlby8_bWlkPTQyMzQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Q49S7N9qXXBNSOGB07KwBg)**
Jenny Beth Martin, the co-founder and national coordinator of the Tea Party Patriots, strongly backed President Donald Trump’s push to have schools reopen in the fall, saying it is vital to “stabilize our society.” **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2VzdGVybmpvdXJuYWwuY29tL3BhdHJpb3RpYy1tb20tdGVsbHMtdHJ1bXAtdHJ1dGgtc2Nob29scy1wb3dlcmZ1bC12aWRlby8_bWlkPTQyMzQxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=2UJsXQx3rrwBqwxhrEoFbg)** | |
---
Since the fight to re-open our schools began, Tea Party Patriots members and our Co-Founder Jenny Beth Martin have been fighting on the frontlines to allow our children to return to school.

One of the main road-blocks that has been encountered thus far are ridiculous, cumbersome guidelines released by the Center for Disease Control and Prevention.

Once these guidelines were released and Americans saw how cumbersome they truly were, we immediately began calling for the guidelines to be revised, immediately.

Following the continued calls of all the dedicated Tea Party Patriots across the US, the CDC finally had to respond. [This past week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvanVsLzkvZHItcm9iZXJ0LXJlZGZpZWxkLWNkYy1kaXJlY3Rvci1pdHMtbm90LXJldmlzaW9uLWcvP21pZD00MjM0MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=sfxjS77-5v9nbD-02hHSgQ), the Director of the CDC, Dr. Robert Redfield, said that while his agency was not going to “revise” the guidelines, they would release new documents providing “additional information to help schools be able to use the guidance.”

Jenny Beth Martin immediately responded, saying this new position was “not good enough.”

She continued, saying:

“The current CDC guidelines are ridiculous. They appear to have been written by someone totally unfamiliar with children and their behavior. They are totally unworkable in the real world. They certainly are not written with the ‘goal of having students physically present in school,’ as the American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP) has advised. And until they are significantly revised, administrators who do not want to reopen schools in the fall will use them as their excuse.”

And then she exposed some major unintended consequences of continued lockdowns and school closures that are being largely overlooked:

“The American Academy of Pediatrics – who are in favor of opening schools – has noted the lockdown has led to social isolation which in turn has led to increased depression and suicide ideation. We also know for certain cases of domestic violence have gone up.”

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vdGlwc2hlZXQvc2FyYWhsZWUvMjAyMC8wNy8wOS9zY2hvb2wtY2hvaWNlLWhhcHB5LWtpZHMtYmFjay1pbi1zY2hvb2wtb3ItZGVwcmVzc2VkLWtpZHMtYXQtaG9tZS1uMjU3MjIxND9taWQ9NDIzNDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Pf1IiXAiio9CxeCqnF6Sew)

**[School Choice: Happy Kids Back In School Or Depressed Kids At Home](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vdGlwc2hlZXQvc2FyYWhsZWUvMjAyMC8wNy8wOS9zY2hvb2wtY2hvaWNlLWhhcHB5LWtpZHMtYmFjay1pbi1zY2hvb2wtb3ItZGVwcmVzc2VkLWtpZHMtYXQtaG9tZS1uMjU3MjIxND9taWQ9NDIzNDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=f__0C0fRqvCEBCq-xymdpg)**
Despite the “furious response” from teachers’ unions and some Democratic legislators, the Trump administration is pushing hard to get kids back into physical classrooms in the fall,... **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vdGlwc2hlZXQvc2FyYWhsZWUvMjAyMC8wNy8wOS9zY2hvb2wtY2hvaWNlLWhhcHB5LWtpZHMtYmFjay1pbi1zY2hvb2wtb3ItZGVwcmVzc2VkLWtpZHMtYXQtaG9tZS1uMjU3MjIxND9taWQ9NDIzNDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=fDWruzkSoLtA5n6D-m2Gag)**

The “cancel culture” movement has met its enemy...

We, the people.

Conservative leaders across the nation issued a strong message to the Democratic outrage mob: **“We will not stand for mob rule.”**

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTkyLTA2MGNkZjJmMjNhNDRlMTE5YTY1M2MxNDllZjQyMjMw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS93YXNoaW5ndG9uLXNlY3JldHMvaGVsbC1uby10b3AtY29uc2VydmF0aXZlcy1maWdodC1pZ25vcmFudC1tb2ItZXJhc2luZy1hbWVyaWNhbi1oaXN0b3J5LXBvbGljZS1mbGFnP21pZD00MjM0MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=4sFrNvh-UgCymiMoeSvjSA)

subject: I'm a Biden online donor and you should be too

body:

| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__recurring&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__recurring&recurring=true")

As a Biden supporter and an online donor, I've been getting a lot of emails from the Biden campaign.

At first I thought, I've already donated. Why do they keep asking?
Then I remember what's at stake, and I donate again.

The campaign to elect Joe Biden is more than a campaign. It's a strong, vibrant movement that I'm proud to be part of.

I know that individuals and families are struggling to get through this historically difficult time of multiple crises. But I also know that President Joe Biden, God willing, will make things less difficult.

If you can give $5, or even one dollar, as a weekly recurring contribution, you'll provide even more power to this growing movement.

The headlines on July 2nd told us that Biden outraised Trump in May and June.

[Will you donate today to help Joe Biden outraise Trump in July?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__recurring&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__recurring&recurring=true")

With your help and your vote, Joe Biden will win DECISIVELY in November!

As you deal with the consequences of the failure of this woefully incompetent president to lead, please know that we're all pulling for you and your loved ones.

Thank you for all you do.

-Carole

_Carole King is a Grammy-winning singer and songwriter who supports Joe Biden for President. And she did actually write this email._
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1564/1889607551/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1562/1889607551/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1560/1889607551/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c155e/1889607551/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c155c/1889607551/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c155a/1889607551/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1558/1889607551/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1556/1889607551/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1554/1889607551/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1552/1889607551/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1558/1889607551/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c154f/1889607551/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c1556/1889607551/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf48/1cd0ac28/8967b26b/357c154d/1889607551/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

He's so terrified of facing MJ in November that just in the past WEEK, his campaign has paid for: 1) a poll of the runoff, 2) a radio ad to boost MJ's opponent, and now 3) a TV ad trying to boost her opponent too!

**They wouldn 't be spending all that money right now if they weren't scared of MJ. Don't let Sen. Cornyn pick his opponent: [Pitch in right now to help us fight back against his campaign's meddling in our primary!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890121/7f51f7bc/41351128/4ef671bc/2169381440/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornynTVad?refcode=email_20200710.2nd__1721__&amount=10")**

Well, Peter, we think it's pretty clear they know MJ will give Sen. Cornyn the run of his political career.

Peter,

My opponent’s pre-primary fundraising numbers were just released and they are truly unbelievable.

Sara Gideon’s campaign more than DOUBLED our fundraising efforts. Even with our best showing to date, it was still not enough. Gideon’s massive dark money war chest continues to grow. On top of these numbers, she is on track to receive a $4 MILLION fund next week.

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: MAGA Rally tomorrow, getting tough on China, and our new store!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/af476bc24d390309/8635e48b93f6f346c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/af476bc24d390309/6853cd5f1fe59687c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Corky Messner Will Greet President Trump at Weekend Rally -_RESCHEDULED_**

Unfortunately, the #MAGA2020 Rally with President Trump scheduled for tomorrow evening has been postponed.

We will be sure to notify you as soon as we receive confirmation for a new time/date from President Trump's Campaign Team.
|
---
**Thanks to Reopening, In-Person Events Make a Welcome Return to the Campaign Schedule**
When you visit our social media sites, you’ll notice more photos of Corky out and about. As we told the _**[Union Leader](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/af476bc24d390309/f3fb46d202ee8551c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_ this week, with the state’s reopening post-pandemic, voters will be seeing a lot more of the candidates in person.
“Campaigning has certainly changed since the pandemic,” says Corky. “Before things shut down, we had done over 250 in-person meetings and events. Since the shutdown, as our campaigning methods adapted to the 'new normal,' our efforts to reach voters intensified. We've attracted an amazing amount of grassroots support through social media, with our Facebook followers growing daily.”

Tele-town halls, virtual roundtables, Zoom meetings and Facebook live events have included tens of thousands of participants, and the campaign has gotten great exposure through traditional media, from morning drive talk radio shows to opinion pieces and letters to the editor in newspapers around the state. We've also rolled out two television ads since spring to much positive response, and our campaign information is being mailed directly to voters.

“Now, as we safely begin to emerge from pandemic restrictions, I've been able to meet and talk with more Granite Staters in person to share my message and hear their concerns. And not surprisingly, my schedule is getting much busier as we head into the final weeks before the primary and I look forward to November's general election.”
|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/af476bc24d390309/b26bbcf95e3d1a24c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky spoke this week with WKXL’s Chris Ryan of NH Now about the President’s trip to New Hampshire, and his thoughts on the opening of the economy and schools in the coming weeks. **[Click here for a listen!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/af476bc24d390309/09bd0d19650dadb7c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**
|
---
**Getting Tough on China**
President Trump this week tweeted, “China has caused great damage to the United States and the rest of the World!” And Corky couldn’t agree more.

The Messner USA Plan: Unleashing The Strength of America has strategies to deal with the economic threat of China, and move forward to return the U.S. economy to pre-pandemic success. Among his initiatives:
* Return “American Made” to prominence once again by incentivizing companies to move their labor from rogue countries like China.
* Pass legislation to ensure government pension funds divest from companies controlled by the Chinese Communist Party.
* Ensure America remains responsibly energy independent and strengthen our supply chains so we are not dependent on foreign countries like China.

“We can emerge from this pandemic, and from these times of social unrest and divisiveness, stronger as a people and as a country,” Corky says. “What we need is a common mission and the common sense to restore the United States of America’s standing as a nation that is the envy of the world.”
|
---
**The Corky Store is Now Open!**
The **[Corky for Senate store](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/af476bc24d390309/b762479779530841c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** is NOW OPEN - have you checked it out yet? Show everyone you support Corky by getting your official campaign shirt today, and be sure to check back regularly, since we’ll be adding to our selection in the weeks to come.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/af476bc24d390309/805592838492209cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

subject: This is an honest email about November:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
The simple truth is that elections are not won solely on ideas and earnest intentions. | |
---
**Derek, in just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a $10 donation between my campaign for president and the DNC today.** I know times are tough for a lot of folks right now, but I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why your support is so critical at this pivotal moment in the race. July marks the beginning of the _last_ full fundraising quarter before Election Day. This means that the campaign infrastructure we’ve spent months building will be put to the test as we face off against Donald Trump and his allies in the general election. Here's where your support comes in, Derek: **The programs we've worked so hard to build won't mean anything if we don’t have the resources to sustain them between now and November.** That’s why a contribution of any amount, made now, is crucial to the longevity of this movement. Without it, we could risk running out of steam right when it matters most. **Democrats nationwide, including me, are relying on supporters like you to step up and demonstrate your commitment to the success of our party. Please, split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC.**

clean_body: The simple truth is that elections are not won solely on ideas and earnest intentions. | | Derek, in just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a $10 donation between my campaign for president and the DNC today. I know times are tough for a lot of folks right now, but I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why your support is so critical at this pivotal moment in the race. July marks the beginning of the last full fundraising quarter before Election Day. This means that the campaign infrastructure we’ve spent months building will be put to the test as we face off against Donald Trump and his allies in the general election. Here's where your support comes in, Derek: The programs we've worked so hard to build won't mean anything if we don’t have the resources to sustain them between now and November. That’s why a contribution of any amount, made now, is crucial to the longevity of this movement. Without it, we could risk running out of steam right when it matters most. Democrats nationwide, including me, are relying on supporters like you to step up and demonstrate your commitment to the success of our party. Please, split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC. The simple truth is that elections are not won solely on ideas and earnest intentions. In order to take back the White House, flip the Senate, and expand our House majority, Democrats nationwide need resources to run competitive campaigns against the GOP. I know that there are a lot of ways you can choose to spend your hard-earned dollars, but I'm not exaggerating when I say that your support at this point in the race could make or break our chances come November. If you can spare anything today for my campaign and our party -- even a few bucks -- it'd go a long way. If we buckle down now and stay focused, I know there’s nothing we cannot achieve together. All my best, Joe Joe Biden P.S. I wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t so important, Derek.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Listening and leading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It's been another busy week for your Indiana GOP. It didn’t look like we had originally planned with 1,800 delegates together in Indianapolis, but

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/welcome-to-the-general-election-469506?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Listening & Leading
It's been another busy week for your Indiana GOP. It didn’t look like we had originally planned with 1,800 delegates together in Indianapolis, but this week voting finally concluded as part of our 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention.

Congratulations to our attorney general nominee, Todd Rokita. Our team is organized, energized and ready to deliver victories for Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch, Todd Rokita and Republicans up and down the ballot in November.

And earlier this week, I'm excited to finally share a program that's long been in the works for us -- the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series (http://indiana.gop/diversity?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . Through this program, we'll work to bring more historically underrepresented communities into civic leadership roles. We'll achieve this by hosting monthly seminar-style classes and by providing mentorship as the members of our to-be-recruited class look to grow their involvement in our party. It's a continuation of the listening and learning we as a party have been undertaking -- and will continue undertaking.

If you know anyone interested, please encourage them to check out our website (http://indiana.gop/diversity?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , ask questions and apply.

And, of course, all of that news is on top of another record fundraising quarter (https://holcombforindiana.com/results-driven-leadership/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for Governor Holcomb (more details below). Hoosier like leadership, and that's what they see from him daily.

It’s been a week of listening and leading. It’s what we do at your Indiana Republican Party and what we’ll continue to do everyday to serve you.

- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

P.S. We did a few media interviews this week on our new Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. Here's one of them from the IndyStar (https://www.indystar.com/story/news/politics/2020/07/07/indiana-gop-recruit-blacks-and-latinos-the-indiana-republican-diversity-leadership-series/5384703002/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) -- check it out.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Indiana: Back on Track

Today, Governor Holcomb is in Evansville as he joins the Southwest Indiana Chamber of Commerce for their (socially distanced) luncheon. He was excited to discuss how Indiana is getting safely back on track, and how together we’re taking steps to continue fighting this pandemic.

One way we’re fighting the pandemic is by using the right PPE when we’re out and about, including wearing a cloth face mask. On Wednesday, we received an update on how Governor Holcomb and his team are leading the way when it comes to providing Hoosier frontline workers, businesses and schools with the resources we need to mask up!
* PPE For Schools: Governor Holcomb’s team is getting critical PPE to schools across the state – just in time to safely reopen schools for a new year. They have more than 3 million reusable masks available for students! In addition to masks, schools will also receive hand sanitizer. This program is available to all schools, and as of Tuesday this week, 472 Indiana school corporations are participating.
* PPE For Businesses: As the Back on Track plan launched, so did the Indiana Small Business PPE Marketplace. Since May, it’s filled more than 30,000 orders to over 600 cities across Indiana, protecting thousands of Hoosiers on the job at our state’s small businesses! And now that requests are shifting, the state is launching the Indiana PPE Directory, which is directly connecting Hoosiers with our local businesses that manufacture or distribute PPE. You can check it out here. (https://backontrack.in.gov/ppedirectory.htm?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We have so much to be thankful for here in Indiana, and that includes Governor Holcomb’s leadership as we continue to navigate this pandemic.

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

https://holcombforindiana.com/results-driven-leadership/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Another Record Fundraising Quarter

Governor Holcomb had another record-setting fundraising quarter. After pausing campaign activity in March and fully focusing on leading Indiana through this pandemic, Governor Holcomb closed the second quarter of 2020 with $8.05 million cash on hand. This impressive total includes $1.48 million raised in less than one month of active fundraising during the quarter. You can read more about his fundraising totals here (https://holcombforindiana.com/results-driven-leadership/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

There’s no doubt about it – Hoosiers appreciate results-driven leadership, they’ve witnessed it firsthand, and the numbers prove that they like what they see!

The Convention Results Are In

It was an unconventional convention, but we were excited to have our delegates fully engaged, with 98% of all ballots returned.

Congratulations to Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch for her unanimous re-nomination. The delegates’ voices have been heard and Todd Rokita will be the Republican nominee for attorney general. We’re looking forward to more Republican victories in November!

http://indiana.gop/diversity?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Apply for the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series

This week, we were excited to officially announce the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, a seminar and leadership training program that will provide the preparation and resources needed to increase the engagement of minority Republican leaders in Indiana.

This program is open to Hoosiers of all backgrounds and all ages as we work to bring more historically underrepresented communities into civic leadership.

Interested in learning more or applying? Check out our website here (http://indiana.gop/diversity?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Have an event to add? Please email it to info@indiana.gop (mailto:info@indiana.gop) !

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb shares his favorite Indiana ice cream shops (https://twitter.com/HolcombForIN/status/1281347533890084866?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch is renominated for lieutenant governor (http://www.wbiw.com/2020/07/09/voting-closes-for-2020-indiana-republican-state-convention/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Todd Young p (https://riponadvance.com/stories/youngs-proposed-bill-expands-mental-behavioral-telehealth-services-for-medicare-patients/?fbclid=IwAR3fAHbnMeJvcf-Z82z3y0MQOFFTiWwvRySjZe12eJSPnglJ8Is8a6dt_FQ&mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) roposes bill that expands mental and behavioral telehealth services (https://riponadvance.com/stories/youngs-proposed-bill-expands-mental-behavioral-telehealth-services-for-medicare-patients/?fbclid=IwAR3fAHbnMeJvcf-Z82z3y0MQOFFTiWwvRySjZe12eJSPnglJ8Is8a6dt_FQ&mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Congresswoman Jackie Walorski s (https://riponadvance.com/stories/walorski-bill-offers-expanded-tax-benefits-for-childcare/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) ponsors bill expanding tax benefits for childcare (https://riponadvance.com/stories/walorski-bill-offers-expanded-tax-benefits-for-childcare/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Banks w (https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/reopen-schools-or-risk-losing-this-generation-rep-jim-banks?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) rites op-ed supporting the reopening of schools in America (https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/reopen-schools-or-risk-losing-this-generation-rep-jim-banks?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Baird tours Belstra Milling in Demotte (https://www.facebook.com/RepJimBaird/posts/611672246132718?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Susan Brooks encourages small businesses to apply for PPP (https://www.facebook.com/CongresswomanSusanWBrooks/posts/3215297328517151?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Greg Pence r (https://www.eaglecountryonline.com/news/local-news/greg-pence-announces-rural-telehealth-funding-in-sixth-district-to-combat-covid-19/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) eports rural telehealth funding for sixth district (https://www.eaglecountryonline.com/news/local-news/greg-pence-announces-rural-telehealth-funding-in-sixth-district-to-combat-covid-19/?mc_cid=a57baa499c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

As the Republican Leader in New Jersey’s State Senate, Tom fights for small businesses, working families, and he stands up against the liberal mob. He’s tough on crime, wants to secure our border, and has the chance to pick up a House seat that will help get Nancy Pelosi out of power. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18212329/220762402/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGVlZmI0Ny0wNWMzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYVfMW_L3kpDmW0-VfM6IuZkDHx33wr3NkJT6KSDhdQ=)
| | Friends, I know I’ve talked a lot in the last few weeks about helping Democratic challengers take on incumbent Republicans.

But my friend Gary Peters in Michigan is in the opposite situation. [He’s one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection this November, in a state Trump won by the slimmest of margins four years ago.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18212330/220762403/254126965?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071020_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGVlZmI0Ny0wNWMzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYVfMW_L3kpDmW0-VfM6IuZkDHx33wr3NkJT6KSDhdQ=)

Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ says that if Republicans win Michigan in 2020, they can keep control of the Senate — and the GOP is clearly using this playbook.

[Super PACs aligned with Betsy DeVos and Mitch McConnell are pumping millions of dollars into Michigan to help their hand-picked candidate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18212331/220762404/254126965?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071020_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGVlZmI0Ny0wNWMzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYVfMW_L3kpDmW0-VfM6IuZkDHx33wr3NkJT6KSDhdQ=)

[Just yesterday, reports showed these dark money groups helped Gary’s opponent outraise him again for the fourth quarter in a row!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18212332/220762405/254126965?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071020_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGVlZmI0Ny0wNWMzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYVfMW_L3kpDmW0-VfM6IuZkDHx33wr3NkJT6KSDhdQ=)

Gary is the type of Senator our country needs — he’s focused on strengthening the middle class and helping small businesses thrive.

[Gary needs our help. If you’re in a position to chip in, can you split a contribution of $10 – or whatever you can – between his campaign and mine? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18212333/220762406/254126965?refcode=EM_FR_B1_071020_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGVlZmI0Ny0wNWMzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uYVfMW_L3kpDmW0-VfM6IuZkDHx33wr3NkJT6KSDhdQ=)

clean_body: = | | Friends, I know I’ve talked a lot in the last few weeks about helping Democratic challengers take on incumbent Republicans. But my friend Gary Peters in Michigan is in the opposite situation. = Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight says that if Republicans win Michigan in 2020, they can keep control of the Senate — and the GOP is clearly using this playbook. = = Gary is the type of Senator our country needs — he’s focused on strengthening the middle class and helping small businesses thrive. = | | = | = | = | = | = Together, we can protect vulnerable Democrats, and take back the Senate. Thank you, Michael Thank you for being a part of Michael’s re-election campaign!** Sending emails is a crucial way to keep supporters like you updated on what Michael is doing in Colorado and Washington D.C. to fight for progress in a purple state. Plus, this campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you! = | | = Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse – thank you so much. We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for your support. | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado Contributions or gifts to Bennet for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Mark Warner for Senate 2020
subject: Doing the math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

_FiveThirtyEight_ 's recent polling analysis shows there's a **" real chance"** of picking up Democratic Senate seats this November and taking leadership back from Republicans.

**[If we want to make this goal of a blue Senate a reality, it's critical that we hold onto the seats we already have by re-electing leaders like Mark.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc0/53d9897e/544905c8/1c884f2c/1465017316/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-demsenmajority?refcode=20200710_f_1_nd__645__&refcode2=ask1&amount=10")**

**Here 's how the math works out:** Right now Republicans have a 53-47 Senate majority. Since the Vice President is the tie-breaker vote in the Senate, Democrats have to flip three seats and win the vice presidency, or flip at least four seats without the vice presidency. _We also have to re-elect all of the Democratic Senators on the ballot this fall._ That's why Mark's re-election campaign is so critical -- and why we're asking for a contribution today.

The path to a Democratic majority runs right through Virginia, and it's critical that we keep up the fight to re-elect Mark, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this fall. **[Please consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can to keep Mark in the Senate.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc0/53d9897e/544905c8/1c884f2b/1465017316/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-demsenmajority?refcode=20200710_f_1_nd__645__&refcode2=ask2&amount=10")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

name: Rob Portman
subject: Where’s your name, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
I’ll be quick here – I’m on my way to discuss the importance of confirming conservative judges with some of my Senate colleagues, and I really want... Peter, I’ll be quick here – I’m on my way to discuss the importance of confirming conservative judges with some of my Senate colleagues, and I really want to show them a long list of supporters who are with us in this fight.
I want to go name-by-name with them to show just how many people will do anything to defend our Constitution and our values. Right now, your name isn’t on the list.
By signing my petition in the next few hours, you can get your name on the list and help me make a statement that the strongest GOP supporters are serious about defending conservative judges: [**DEFEND CONSERVATIVE JUDGES**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=b9e0b032f737420aba811ac6db6fca94&_e=gelg9Yx1Nu_P96dv-l1QHMVwWXw4rwZFH1Zic8hVGO4_iPugH-8yZUcX2Rvvu2YN8oqAba4FfGlrOCBBKA9Zt7d_l30BhtS8HsKoAhS-SjkuKfw86DKbxZUxqxwsvBhciVhq3W1F5bt6u61oYYJHLXQMn3V1SjLPHkAkQIgLJMnKv2ChISb098ph2ZDSDy7a_CUKGTlC_dDxNeYfjFCyQI3LbY1VVQ1ABWaUZUgfQZ92qZq6rS1WciU4XLWeOlz2WiSnel2GSQDxV5j9TifJgUv9bm17DeCvXRcYQl9cywW7m6lW6V4pxqi2ZCqOQPaG_MVk49qkI6bbIouCQqJEbTiqLCTadGYBPlkOJN8DsYpQjM1X4i8pDGKmjxKm2ACoI9cFu1bvB_qwnVbwLy-Z0UKM7D1T6dHK1KnWBU6_TUM9AJxVg5oleFg65Nacc2_L) [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=b9e0b032f737420aba811ac6db6fca94&_e=gelg9Yx1Nu_P96dv-l1QHMVwWXw4rwZFH1Zic8hVGO4_iPugH-8yZUcX2Rvvu2YN8oqAba4FfGlrOCBBKA9Zt7d_l30BhtS8HsKoAhS-SjkuKfw86DKbxZUxqxwsvBhciVhq3W1F5bt6u61oYYJHLXQMn3V1SjLPHkAkQIgLJMnKv2ChISb098ph2ZDSDy7axsr4W31ksUbB4hwWKdyDNgHCOu8Ga65MfLFn-7kzsDyT38hR8zaqkifroUQbRuZYuTvtNLqhQ9G9jBR-prffAFj_BqpZSXnzjGiueB2kf0GeMgCWurzgfBKe9EZiScWfgBHZ7gOGPUxqJPfZOZEULPCLX0hC_ICwVoO7OJ8okA_2WW51s9zPQJ_ROmxV_BtNAVzpS0IfQ5vUmYmVTqxqHHvuL4BgstcVIw_lID2rhOYhZIOt-kBU6xtYVSdFL0bC) So, Peter, if you side with Chuck Schumer and Elizabeth Warren, you can delete this email...
But if you’re in the fight for smaller government, more freedom, and a defense of liberty, I need you to add your name RIGHT NOW!
Make sure you add your name quickly - I want to make sure it’s on the list when I show my Senate colleagues!
–Rob Portman Peter, What is our Republican Senate majority’s greatest accomplishment?
There’s a lot of choices to choose from... tax cuts for working families, new incentives for companies to do business in America, the biggest pay raise ever for our military?
While all of these examples are crucially important, there is only one accomplishment that will last a lifetime... the confirmation of hundreds of conservative judges.
And Peter... just last week, the Senate confirmed President Trump’s TWO HUNDREDTH judge to the federal bench – a momentous feat.
It’s true, Peter, the conservative judges confirmed by the Senate and President Trump will serve as beacons of our conservative values in courtrooms all around the nation, for decades to come.
But with every great success comes a new challenge. The left has begun to use these judges as a rallying cry for their radical base. They’re raising money, recruiting volunteers, and taking to the streets to advocate for a future VOID of defenders of conservatism.
They want it to be a thing of the past.
That’s why I’m asking for your help – we need to act quickly if we’re going to protect the values these good judges are fighting to preserve. **[We need to counter the efforts of the far left... will you sign the petition and join my fight?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=b9e0b032f737420aba811ac6db6fca94&_e=gelg9Yx1Nu_P96dv-l1QHMVwWXw4rwZFH1Zic8hVGO4_iPugH-8yZUcX2Rvvu2YN8oqAba4FfGlrOCBBKA9Zt7d_l30BhtS8HsKoAhS-SjkuKfw86DKbxZUxqxwsvBhciVhq3W1F5bt6u61oYYJHLXQMn3V1SjLPHkAkQIgLJMnKv2ChISb098ph2ZDSDy7azb-8qRgVwVw72qDfrZtdW9ExaDK2n3-gmBxTTBE34AwkJlWQqzHMDtlZszdm-reXUHd7KCbF97FnwsxXfPIBb8U7ek14yO92J_ci0C72noZPfbutyD_0AKqiAQdYmvzEIpjqBPMuf2fz4ktIxpAIcP6zER9TRu8vLcqJSGHFFwjO9oscpqU8mYYdVbS_MkNUR8SnPEqWny-uAm2C5Co0sFCQE1a9tXaRi1LoK9WZDTahup0P_QvSTQEKYA8h-zVa)** [**MORE CONSERVATIVE JUDGES**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=b9e0b032f737420aba811ac6db6fca94&_e=gelg9Yx1Nu_P96dv-l1QHMVwWXw4rwZFH1Zic8hVGO4_iPugH-8yZUcX2Rvvu2YN8oqAba4FfGlrOCBBKA9Zt7d_l30BhtS8HsKoAhS-SjkuKfw86DKbxZUxqxwsvBhciVhq3W1F5bt6u61oYYJHLXQMn3V1SjLPHkAkQIgLJMnKv2ChISb098ph2ZDSDy7aKuBVZz1rEHSnigOgoTnsj_QPmUW-gRS91PXicWCbLpeLsgvydHKjHmeBsdtg92GOPEH8LCBkeiWQfzf0q7hGUW56iIC2SwNzl9_GvHxjbOxIdMg-np_uWTf-BEMTE9wS0X2z3Rao42G-ZQbpJZvSELQhog7MVwLBnwg1DhugYf0bax1cd1LSpFHsjNhIsVik2fjqPXKIIddGkh0VoVRCI0CzetZCnHCwpfNraqVdpYCblvIjLII3RAVwHt95qSWG) [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=b9e0b032f737420aba811ac6db6fca94&_e=gelg9Yx1Nu_P96dv-l1QHMVwWXw4rwZFH1Zic8hVGO4_iPugH-8yZUcX2Rvvu2YN8oqAba4FfGlrOCBBKA9Zt7d_l30BhtS8HsKoAhS-SjkuKfw86DKbxZUxqxwsvBhciVhq3W1F5bt6u61oYYJHLXQMn3V1SjLPHkAkQIgLJMnKv2ChISb098ph2ZDSDy7a_rinu5vtCPyO4VRTFhudIP0ospYDBzzhBXNDW_iE0ZNjMbeIV4JD1UeBLAtcM38TXHpAbLJciz4Wxr5SzX46Ke67eqFiUboXdEttQ1Ot_nbfdMPC7HCfpINnKdzknfDmPuzNKI9-rujij2118K8WysHRBs2R5f8ECda2oR_rwRQFD0D7d25iOpVjI5ISEanKU-NuTdquglsezOB7_ktPuw_N90h7wGPDhai-H-R13UO1nCEEpCgflMMSzj0csaro) They want to restrict our speech and make on-demand abortion an absolute right. They want to grow the size of our government and give more power to politicians and bureaucrats.
**[Peter, Republicans in Congress are working hard to defend these conservative judges, but we need your help.](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=b9e0b032f737420aba811ac6db6fca94&_e=gelg9Yx1Nu_P96dv-l1QHMVwWXw4rwZFH1Zic8hVGO4_iPugH-8yZUcX2Rvvu2YN8oqAba4FfGlrOCBBKA9Zt7d_l30BhtS8HsKoAhS-SjkuKfw86DKbxZUxqxwsvBhciVhq3W1F5bt6u61oYYJHLXQMn3V1SjLPHkAkQIgLJMnKv2ChISb098ph2ZDSDy7amcN1zWUiYC2Z3DNaqCOci4GtKG_IQQcByJrLYtsCijuyFlfbZtw5CNhqv2iBCZ-RK7S18H0cqL9VKb4s0T7rSNbwuxikndd4gzN4JavMY3jsZUUYr_DJwIz8yUaN-Rdppi0meygn9ZH87PE4JkzpSxYoUIg0Sn0iKj0HwadjBypybZV8whHk3ThKhzSZUnwZ4tW8gmYt0Ns9pEqu5bESEDi56oSq1oqvoevlgESisi3UF51YNgCpugFzCwpEio3B) **
With the power of the grassroots, we can show the left that the American people REJECT their efforts to replace our conservative values. Will you SIGN THE PETITION to help make that statement and PROTECT conservative judges?
I’m counting on you to show that you’re in this fight.
**[With your help, we can make sure these protectors of our values last for decades. Will you sign the petition immediately?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=b9e0b032f737420aba811ac6db6fca94&_e=gelg9Yx1Nu_P96dv-l1QHMVwWXw4rwZFH1Zic8hVGO4_iPugH-8yZUcX2Rvvu2YN8oqAba4FfGlrOCBBKA9Zt7d_l30BhtS8HsKoAhS-SjkuKfw86DKbxZUxqxwsvBhciVhq3W1F5bt6u61oYYJHLXQMn3V1SjLPHkAkQIgLJMnKv2ChISb098ph2ZDSDy7aRNb6Omo4WppJXmvCkVgCX0m-wUooG546twICqcxnb83XQpxy7swvmM2AjzknBOGWT4IcZunhuLcicFXRI28CjI8wsN8-DYOG3RIHO-T_5wQ8ZFK5Eg6gIZvsBWK5MfuJDOIeOBH-kR-tJhIJkWE4eOFYoYT36_lWbr5hW1t8MC8MBnNbgQOn8LTcXEf20e1L0RJumQ9OpNgxC57P28Km7Rc7xFr-J7Df9HwQzgnt8jzZV2LDGRqGSFPPXzdNbLLi)**

## **CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT 36 UPDATE**
Friends and fellow patriots, Our battle continues. This week we confronted Ruiz regarding his job killing vote for the Pro-Act! A Federal version of CA-AB5, a proven job and industry killer, we must not allow a proven supporter of this legislation to continue on in Congress. The Pro-Act is currently in the Senate. Your continued support shows you back small businesses, private contractors, and jobs for all—not just some. This last week, our supporters did an amazing job making contributions to the Campaign. It is crucial we keep up momentum. We still need your contributions and support, now more than ever. This is undoubtedly a difficult time for all, however if we don’t flip this seat, times will get even more difficult. Every dollar will go to work to reach voters in the 36th District, and win back our Congressional District 36! If every member and supporter who reads this donates $36, Erin Cruz & Republicans and lovers of Liberty and job freedom will have what it takes to win in November. $360 would send us over the top! Can we count on you? Thank you for helping unite the 36th District and Flip this Seat -- FOR THE PEOPLE! Respectfully, Erin Cruz
Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives
Congressional District 36
ErinCruz.org P.S. Look for an email outlining PRO-Act talking points you can use in the field while volunteering for Erin Cruz for Congress! More jobs.. More opportunities, this is one more reason to vote Erin Cruz in November! **People before Politics. Liberty before Legislation. Constitution over Chaos.** NEWS UPDATE:
Erin Cruz has resumed onsite Campaign Events and outreach in the 36th District.
Erin Cruz continues to be an outspoken supporter on the issues that matter to you.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Today, I'm endorsing 14 more Democrats:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This November, if we all get in the fight, we can expand our House majority, take back the Senate, win the White House, flip state houses, and elect leaders who'll get results for working people acros | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e84623/236102059/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Look around. It's clear: Our country desperately needs bold leadership, at every level of our government.

Today, I'm honored to endorse 14 Democrats running up and down the ballot. I hope you'll fight by their side, just like you've fought by mine.

**City**

Tishaura Jones (St. Louis City Treasurer)

**State Legislature**

Ricky Hurtado (North Carolina House's 63rd District)

Patti Minter (Kentucky House 20th)

Brandon Thomas (Tennessee House 49th)

Lydia Bean (Texas House 49th)

Erin Zwiener (Texas House 45th)

**U.S. House**

Desiree Tims (Ohio's 10th District)

Pramila Jayapal (Washington State 7th)

Sima Ladjevardian (Texas 2nd)

Bonnie Watson Coleman (New Jersey 12th)

Kate Schroder (Ohio 1st)

**Governor**

Nicole Galloway (Missouri)

**U.S. Senate**

Jaime Harrison (South Carolina)

Cory Booker (New Jersey)

**They're ready to fight for working people, and they know how to deliver results. But to win in November, they need our grassroots movement fighting by their side.**

**[If it makes sense for you right now, can you pitch in $2 or more to help elect Warren Democrats like these across the country? Your support is powerfully important in the fight for a government that puts people first.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e84622/236102059/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDA3X0FOTl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMDcxMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT07_ANN_END_E_20200710_V1S1_P")**

Here are two things I'd like to say about the candidates I endorse.

I don't just look for big national names -- I look for people who are serving their communities at every level of government. Today's leaders at the state and local level are tomorrow's members of Congress, and Democrats definitely need to build a big bench of future federal candidates. But state and local officials are also making decisions _right now_ that touch people's daily lives. So we need to roll up our sleeves and get in the fight by their side.

And from city government to the U.S. Senate, I endorse candidates who know that we need bold reform to root out corruption, put people first, and build a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

**This November, if we all get in the fight, we can elect Warren Democrats up and down the ticket, and all across the country. We can expand our House majority, take back the Senate, win the White House, flip state houses, and elect leaders who'll get results for working people.**

[But it takes real resources to mobilize millions of voters. And that's why I'm asking: If you're able to, please chip in $2 or whatever makes sense. You'll help elect Warren Democrats in 2020. And you'll help grow our grassroots movement to make big, structural change.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e84622/236102059/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDA3X0FOTl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMDcxMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT07_ANN_END_E_20200710_V1S1_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e84622/236102059/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDA3X0FOTl9FTkRfRV8yMDIwMDcxMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT07_ANN_END_E_20200710_V1S1_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e84619/236102059/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e84618/236102059/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e8461b/236102059/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e8461a/236102059/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e8461d/236102059/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250d2/45c30650/1cf0713a9/66e8461c/236102059/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Joe Biden
subject: fwd: Focus group invite #4012679 for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
My team will be compiling our responses tomorrow, so make sure you open your invitation before midnight. |
---
Peter,

I know my team asks for your feedback on a regular basis through special focus groups like these and other surveys, but this might be our most important one yet.

We don't have much time between now and Election Day, and _even_ _less_ time between now and the Democratic National Convention. So we've got to make sure we're ready to welcome the millions of folks we'll need onto our grassroots coalition to beat Trump.

And since you've been with me since before we made it to the general election, I'm really looking forward to reading your feedback on how to bring new folks on board -- but it looks like you haven't accepted your invitation to join our Pre-Convention Focus Group yet.

[**Will you take just a couple of minutes to join our focus group today? My team will be compiling our responses tomorrow, so make sure you open your invitation before midnight:**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bd/3964641825/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2") | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bc/3964641825/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
---
Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with us.

Joe

\---Forwarded Message---
**From:** JoeBiden.com
**Date:** Tues, Jul 7, 2020
**Subject:** [Focus group invite #4012679 for Peter](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bd/3964641825/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
**To:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bd/3964641825/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")

Peter,

There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President.

This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump!

**So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help.**

[ Will you be a part of our Pre-Convention Focus Group and answer a few quick survey questions for us?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bc/3964641825/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bc/3964641825/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
---
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bc/3964641825/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
---
We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and _less than three months_ left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing.

But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states.

So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean _everyone_!

The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that.

[So even if you've answered questions like this before, we count on surveys like this to gather new data and percentages as our team grows and new events (like the convention!) take place.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bc/3964641825/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")

**Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward.**
[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bc/3964641825/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pre-convention-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.10_B3_conventionfocusgroup_X__F1_S1_C2__ns_T2")
---
Thanks,

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13bb/3964641825/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13ba/3964641825/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b9/3964641825/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b8/3964641825/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b7/3964641825/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b5/3964641825/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b4/3964641825/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b3/3964641825/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b2/3964641825/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer-wsupporterboxJRB")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

[DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b6/3964641825/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer-wsupporterboxJRB&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b4/3964641825/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf44/1cd0ac28/8ab4bd78/357c13b0/3964641825/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
clean_body: My team will be compiling our responses tomorrow, so make sure you open your invitation before midnight. | Peter, I know my team asks for your feedback on a regular basis through special focus groups like these and other surveys, but this might be our most important one yet. We don't have much time between now and Election Day, and even less time between now and the Democratic National Convention. So we've got to make sure we're ready to welcome the millions of folks we'll need onto our grassroots coalition to beat Trump. And since you've been with me since before we made it to the general election, I'm really looking forward to reading your feedback on how to bring new folks on board -- but it looks like you haven't accepted your invitation to join our Pre-Convention Focus Group yet. "" | "" Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. Joe \---Forwarded Message--- From: JoeBiden.com Date: Tues, Jul 7, 2020 Subject: "" To: "" Peter, There are only 41 days before the start of the Democratic National Convention on August 17, where Joe Biden will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President. This is going to be a huge moment for Democrats across the country, and we know everyone is going to be fired up about electing Joe Biden and defeating Donald Trump! So we've really got to hustle to put the final touches on our strategy for maximizing this momentum, and we need your help. "" "" "" We'll have the top of our Democratic ticket locked in (including Joe's future running mate!) and less than three months left to defeat Donald Trump by the convention's closing. But it's not just about taking back the White House -- we also have to keep (and expand on!) our majority in the House, take back the Senate, and put more Democrats in office across all 50 states. So when we say we need everyone to join our coalition to elect Joe and defeat Trump, we mean everyone! The convention is going to be a huge moment to build momentum and bring more folks on to Team Joe, so we want your feedback on our plan to do that. "" Peter, we'll be going over your responses this week, so can you please submit your feedback today? It only takes a few minutes, and it will make a big impact on our strategy moving forward. "" Thanks, JoeBiden.com | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" "" Donated to Biden for President? No, not yet! Suggested Action: "" | "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

[See for yourself here.](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=vUbJLnQs5X0eAKhqSRtr_WVE4QG__3yt9Iu7xJlRxJSxs7iNls_hfG2N141YUO5_Q6OWmE00Qpyh6WqMmuOysnSHt9CXfOK5JPUzRypDnLR9ygp6rr2Hx9e085XkL4bXXnpYjx3muCTxil95Pxlzdg&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_leader&n=2) [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4cakbkA4unhbsD5V267iqrCrBj1fofEjjEUck3OsrayNnVxmG2Z2xyMlwfDftU8gSAV&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_leader&n=3) We are one step closer to having our Conservative Counterpunch in Congress to Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar, and to ending Charlie Crist’s political career but we are not done yet. The primary is one month away and we can't take anything for granted. Will you help us seal the deal and defeat Charlie? | [](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4cakbkA4unhbsD5V267iqrCrBj1fofEjjEUck3OsrayNnVxmG2Z2xyMlwfDftU8gSAV&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_leader&n=4 "CONTRIBUTE HERE") [CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4cakbkA4unhbsD5V267iqrCrBj1fofEjjEUck3OsrayNnVxmG2Z2xyMlwfDftU8gSAV&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_leader&n=5)

Florida's 13th District was Republican for over 40 years until Charlie came along and with your help, we will make it Republican again! Charlie does not even show up to vote, and does not represent the values of Pinellas.

Amanda

| _Organizing for everyone._

We're proud to announce that our users can now register to vote, apply for mail-in or absentee ballots, and make sure their friends have done the same, all within Outvote.

Learn more about how we're increasing civic participation with a few clicks in [our blog post announcing the new feature](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=7ea505eb50&e=0aad15100c).
